By TeamNewPipe
github.com/TeamNewPipe/NewPipeExtractor
License: GNU General Public License v3 (GPL v3)
Purpose: On-device YouTube stream extraction
By Google / Android Jetpack\nLicense: Apache 2.0\nPurpose: Background refresh scheduling

Preference.app:title: Room Database
Preference.app:summary: By Google / Android Jetpack\nLicense: Apache 2.0\nPurpose: Local video cache
By Coil Contributors\nLicense: Apache 2.0\nPurpose: Image loading

Preference.app:title: Not affiliated with YouTube or Google
Preference.app:summary: This app uses NewPipe Extractor for on-device stream extraction. No YouTube account or API key is required. This app is for personal use only.
Sideload only. This app must NOT be uploaded to the Google Play Store by anyone except the original developer (theothernt).

Preference.app:title: No Warranty
Preference.app:summary: This program is distributed without any warranty. See the GPL v3 license for details.
